AssociateResourcesToSubscription.description: Grants permission to associate resources with a subscription

CancelSubscription.description: Grants permission to cancel a subscription

CancelSubscriptionChange.description: Grants permission to cancel a pending a change for a subscription

CreateSubscription.description: Grants permission to create a subscription

DisassociateResourcesFromSubscription.description: Grants permission to disassociate resources from a subscription

GetSubscription.description: Grants permission to get the details for a subscription

ListSubscriptions.description: Grants permission to list subscriptions in your account

UpdateSubscription.description: Grants permission to update a subscription
